title: Battleship
description: Transfers the Battleship board game to Minecraft
body:
![Mod logo "Battleship"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a33819259c6e70382d7b80066d4bfd5e55ee12b.png)
**Adds a flag, a cross and 3 ships to play battleship in Minecraft.**

### About resource pack📄:
Added 3 types of ship: small, medium and large

![Three types of ships: medium, small and large](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecf41c0f99245a180e05d247f9c93eff2443f499.png)

Also resource pack adds flag and cross

![Cross and flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f8e02e7f81c75acfec2bfeee0da70ca260e80d3.png)

### All renames:
### Iron ingot - Small ship | Medium ship | Large ship | Cross | Flag
### All renames(RU):
### Железный слиток - Маленький корабль, Средний корабль, Большой корабль, Крест, Флаг

### There are 2 versions of the mod. With and without invisible item frames

If you want to change the resource pack, then ask for permission from me in discord
__________________________________________________________________________________________

### FOR THIS RESOURCE PACK TO WORK CORRECTLY, YOU NEED AN OPTIFINE/CIT RESEWN/CIT REFORGED/CIT FORGE!!!

### Also check my other projects!
My discord server: [Discord link](https://discord.com/invite/SKCbGtehye)
